name: collector aggregates suppression counts combining the rule-loop suppression log and the inline-suppression log
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/suppressions && printf 'rule-a
rule-b
' > .claude-tdd-pro/suppressions/rule-loop.log && printf 'rule-a
' > .claude-tdd-pro/suppressions/inline.log && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/collector.sh" --metric suppression-count --since 30d 2>out.txt && grep -q 'suppression_total=3' out.txt && grep -q 'rule_loop=2' out.txt && grep -q 'inline=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
